summary: Scan-in-progress state captured via CDP during SKILLBOX_SCAN_DELAY_MS=1000 window. At T+400ms DOM shows button 'Scanning...' [disabled] and toast 'Scanning skills...' confirming the scanning indicator is present and observable. Button reverts to 'Scan' (enabled) after completion with 'Skills scanned' toast. SKILLBOX_SCAN_DELAY_MS env var confirmed in Go sidecar process (pid 57289) via ps eww. Prior NEEDS_HUMAN replaced.
decision_basis: Spinner/in-progress state is observable via CDP with SKILLBOX_SCAN_DELAY_MS=1000. The delay hook pauses after classifying entries and before committing results, giving CDP enough time to capture. Manual Scan button used (not auto-scan) because sessionAutoScanRegistry blocks auto-scan re-trigger within the same app session.
